ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format for the date in properties (yyyy-mm-dd, MMMM D, yyyy, yyyy-mm-dd HH:mm)
ast.target: 属性中日期的格式（yyyy-mm-dd、MMMM D, yyyy、yyyy-mm-dd HH:mm）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add right-click context menu option to copy heading links in various formats.
ast.target: 添加右键菜单选项，以多种格式复制标题链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the default format for copied heading links. Obsidian format respects your Obsidian settings for wikilink vs Markdown preference. Astro link uses your link base path from above and converts the heading into kebab-case format as an anchor link
ast.target: 选择复制标题链接的默认格式。Obsidian 格式会遵循您在 Obsidian 中设置的维基链接或 Markdown 偏好。Astro 链接使用上述链接基础路径，并将标题转换为短横线格式作为锚点链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add trailing slashes to all converted internal links (/about/ instead of /about).
ast.target: 为所有转换后的内部链接添加尾部斜杠（例如 /about/ 而非 /about）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically process new files when they're changed in the background (by Git or other plugins). Disable to prevent modal spam when files are already processed on other devices during a sync.
ast.target: 当文件在后台（通过 Git 或其他插件）发生更改时，自动处理新文件。禁用此选项可避免在同步过程中，当文件已在其他设备上处理时出现模态弹窗干扰。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make .mdx files visible in Obsidian's file explorer. Requires reload to take effect.
ast.target: 使 .mdx 文件在 Obsidian 的文件浏览器中可见。需要重新加载才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically insert the properties template when creating new files.
ast.target: 创建新文件时自动插入属性模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, clicking into the title property will trigger the rename file command, keeping the file slug in sync.
ast.target: 启用后，点击标题属性将触发重命名文件命令，保持文件别名同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Update 'date' property when switching from draft to published status.
ast.target: 当状态从草稿切换为已发布时，更新“日期”属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How draft status is determined. Property-based uses a boolean property (draft: true). Underscore prefix uses the file name (_my-post.md = draft).
ast.target: 草稿状态的判定方式。基于属性：使用布尔属性（draft: true）。下划线前缀：使用文件名（_my-post.md = 草稿）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The property field to use for draft status.
ast.target: 用于草稿状态的属性字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether the property value 'true' means it is a draft or published.
ast.target: 属性值“true”表示草稿还是已发布。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The property field to update when published ('date' or 'pubdate').
ast.target: 发布时要更新的属性字段（“date”或“pubdate”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable command to open terminal in project root directory.
ast.target: 启用命令以在项目根目录中打开终端。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log terminal launch commands and platform decisions to the developer console for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 将终端启动命令和平台决策记录到开发者控制台，以便进行故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a ribbon icon to launch the terminal command.
ast.target: 添加一个功能区图标以启动终端命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable command to open Astro config file in default editor.
ast.target: 启用命令以在默认编辑器中打开 Astro 配置文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a ribbon icon to launch the config file command.
ast.target: 添加一个功能区图标以启动配置文件命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace the help button in the vault profile area with a custom action.
ast.target: 将保险库配置文件区域中的帮助按钮替换为自定义操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the command to execute when the button is clicked.
ast.target: 选择单击按钮时要执行的命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the icon to display on the button.
ast.target: 选择要在按钮上显示的图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display name for this content type ('projects', 'notes', 'tutorials')
ast.target: 此内容类型的显示名称（例如“项目”、“笔记”、“教程”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder path where this content type will be created. Leave blank to use the vault folder. Supports wildcards like directory/* or directory/*/* to match specific folder depths.
ast.target: 此内容类型将创建的文件夹路径。留空则使用保险库文件夹。支持通配符，例如 directory/* 或 directory/*/* 以匹配特定的文件夹深度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, automation will only trigger for new .md files within this content type's folder and one level down (for folder-based content). Files in deeper subfolders will be ignored.
ast.target: 启用后，自动化将仅针对此内容类型文件夹内及其下一级（针对基于文件夹的内容）的新 .md 文件触发。更深子文件夹中的文件将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add an underscore prefix (_content-title) to new notes by default when enabled. This hides them from Astro, which can be helpful for drafts
ast.target: 启用后，默认在新笔记前添加下划线前缀（_content-title）。这会将笔记对 Astro 隐藏，对草稿很有帮助。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base path for converted links ('/projects/', '/notes/tutorials/', leave blank for root /).
ast.target: 转换链接的基础路径（例如 '/projects/'、'/notes/tutorials/'，留空表示根目录 '/'）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to create new entries: file-based or folder-based with an index file.
ast.target: 如何创建新条目：基于文件，或基于文件夹并包含索引文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name for index files in folder-based content (without .md extension). Defaults to 'index' if left blank.
ast.target: 基于文件夹的内容中索引文件的名称（不含 .md 扩展名）。留空则默认为 'index'。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create files with .mdx extension instead of .md extension.
ast.target: 使用 .mdx 扩展名创建文件，而非 .md 扩展名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The property field to update with the modified date for this content type. Leave blank to disable.
ast.target: 要使用此内容类型的修改日期进行更新的属性字段。留空以禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot rename: this file is not part of a configured content type folder.
ast.target: 无法重命名：此文件不属于已配置的内容类型文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open terminal command is disabled. Enable it in settings to use this command.
ast.target: 打开终端命令已禁用。请在设置中启用它以使用此命令。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Edit config file command is disabled. Enable it in settings to use this command.
ast.target: 编辑配置文件命令已禁用。请在设置中启用它以使用此命令。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No properties template specified for this content. This file doesn't match any configured content type folders.
ast.target: 未为此内容指定属性模板。此文件与任何已配置的内容类型文件夹都不匹配。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到内容类型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已使用模板标准化属性。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Terminal commands are not supported on this platform.
ast.target: 此平台不支持终端命令。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Terminal application name is empty. Please configure it in settings.
ast.target: 终端应用程序名称为空。请在设置中进行配置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No supported terminal found. Please install a terminal application or configure one in settings.
ast.target: 未找到支持的终端。请安装终端应用程序或在设置中配置一个。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Opening files in an external editor is not supported on this platform.
ast.target: 此平台不支持在外部编辑器中打开文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please specify a config file path in settings.
ast.target: 请在设置中指定配置文件路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Migration skipped. Old posts/pages settings will be ignored.
ast.target: 迁移已跳过。旧的帖子/页面设置将被忽略。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Migration skipped due to error. You can migrate manually in settings.
ast.target: 由于错误，迁移已跳过。您可以在设置中手动迁移。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Astro Composer failed to load. Check console (Ctrl+Shift+I) for details.
ast.target: Astro Composer 加载失败。请查看控制台 (Ctrl+Shift+I) 了解详情。
